title: Excalibur | My nether's Delight Support
description: This is a texture pack made to work with the My Nether's Delight mod having the medieval aesthetics of the Excalibur texture pack
body:
This is a resource pack made to work with the [My Nether's Delight mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/my-nethers-delight) having the medieval aesthetics of the Excalibur'S Resource Pack by Maffhew

 

My Nether's Delight is a mod addon for the legendary culinary content mod of  Farmer's Delight, Not to be confused with "Nether's Delight" which is an outdated mod from the same autor.

 

This pack is inspired by the [Farmer's Delight Resource pack by TC_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-farmers-delight-support), so it is made to work together without any problem otherwise.

![stove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f222c652ad1337b17fb8d4873c9ea9ec64ecc475.png)

![drawners](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae054b2c8e6ef97b32a529adb4ec73d2f29c8e6.png)

![trophies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce15477605aac87391ee9670b2986d02f315f4df.png)
